---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<!-- WELCOME BANNER -->
<section class="welcome-section">
  <h1>Welcome to the HF Data Portal</h1>
  <p class="welcome-sub">
    The Health Facility Data Portal is a centralised resource for structured,
    quality-assured facility data relevant to malaria modelling in sub-Saharan
    Africa. Explore our country pages for guidance on accessing and using
    health facility datasets.
  </p>
</section>

<!-- SELECTOR CARD: dropdown + workflow diagram -->
<section class="selector-section">
  <div class="selector-card">

    <div class="selector-left">
      <label for="countrySelect">I am looking for data from</label>
      <select class="country-select" id="countrySelect" onchange="onCountryChange(this)">
        <option value="" disabled selected>Select a country…</option>
        <option value="countries/tanzania.html">🇹🇿 Tanzania</option>
        <option value="countries/kenya.html">🇰🇪 Kenya</option>
        <option value="countries/uganda.html">🇺🇬 Uganda</option>
      </select>
      <button class="proceed-btn" id="proceedBtn" onclick="goToCountry()" disabled>
        Proceed ➔
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="workflow-diagram">

      <!-- Row 1: left to right -->
      <div class="wf-row">
        <div class="wf-node">
          <span class="wf-icon">🔍</span>
          I need HF data for modelling
        </div>
        <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="wf-node wf-center">
          <span class="wf-icon">🏥</span>
          Discover HF Portal
        </div>
        <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="wf-node wf-action">
          <span class="wf-icon">📂</span>
          Explore country pages
        </div>
        <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="wf-node wf-action">
          <span class="wf-icon">💾</span>
          Find relevant datasets
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Turn: down arrow on right side -->
      <div class="wf-turn-row">
        <div class="wf-turn-spacer"></div>
        <div class="wf-arrow wf-arrow-down"> <- </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Row 2: right to left (snake) -->
      <div class="wf-row wf-row-reverse">
        <div class="wf-node wf-download">
          <span class="wf-icon">⬇️</span>
          Download data
        </div>
        <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="wf-node wf-decision">
          <span class="wf-icon">❓</span>
          Decide whether to download
        </div>
        <div class="wf-arrow">→</div>
        <div class="wf-node wf-external">
          <span class="wf-icon">🔗</span>
          Review &amp; access source
        </div>
        <!-- <div class="wf-arrow">→</div> -->
        <!-- <div class="wf-node wf-action"> -->
        <!--   <span class="wf-icon">ℹ️</span> -->
        <!--   Review quality report -->
        <!-- </div> -->
      </div>

    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<hr class="hf-divider">

<!-- FEATURE CARDS -->
<section class="features-section">
  <div class="feature-cards">

    <div class="feature-card">
      <h3>Facility Datasets</h3>
      <div class="card-svg">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80" fill="none" stroke="#3d7a6e" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <rect x="12" y="12" width="20" height="22" rx="3"/>
          <rect x="30" y="8" width="20" height="22" rx="3"/>
          <line x1="40" y1="30" x2="40" y2="46"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="38" x2="40" y2="46"/>
          <line x1="48" y1="38" x2="40" y2="46"/>
          <ellipse cx="40" cy="52" rx="14" ry="5"/>
          <line x1="26" y1="52" x2="26" y2="62"/>
          <line x1="54" y1="52" x2="54" y2="62"/>
          <ellipse cx="40" cy="62" rx="14" ry="5"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <p>Access georeferenced, harmonised facility lists including type, ownership, service availability, and administrative hierarchy across malaria-endemic countries.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="feature-card">
      <h3>Documentation</h3>
      <div class="card-svg">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80" fill="none" stroke="#3d7a6e" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <rect x="20" y="12" width="34" height="44" rx="3"/>
          <rect x="24" y="8" width="34" height="44" rx="3" fill="white" stroke="#3d7a6e"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="24" x2="50" y2="24"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="31" x2="50" y2="31"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="38" x2="50" y2="38"/>
          <line x1="32" y1="45" x2="44" y2="45"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <p>Detailed quality reports and methodology documentation describing how each dataset was collected, cleaned, and validated for disease modelling use.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="feature-card">
      <h3>Code Examples</h3>
      <div class="card-svg">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 80 80" fill="none" stroke="#3d7a6e" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
          <rect x="10" y="16" width="60" height="48" rx="4"/>
          <line x1="10" y1="28" x2="70" y2="28"/>
          <circle cx="20" cy="22" r="2.5"/>
          <circle cx="29" cy="22" r="2.5"/>
          <circle cx="38" cy="22" r="2.5"/>
          <polyline points="24,40 32,50 24,60"/>
          <line x1="38" y1="60" x2="56" y2="60"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <p>Worked R and Python examples showing how to load, clean, and integrate health facility data into epidemiological models and access-to-care analyses.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<hr class="hf-divider">

<!-- ABOUT STRIP -->
<section class="about-strip">
  <div class="about-inner">
    <div class="about-text">
      <h2>Responsible Access to Health Facility Data for Analysis and Research</h2>
      <p>
        The HF Data Portal makes it easier to find and use health facility data for
        malaria modelling. The Portal collates facility lists from national master
        facility registers, DHIS2, and partner sources — documenting each dataset
        and providing code examples for integration into modelling workflows.
      </p>
      <p>
        While data files are hosted on Zenodo, the Portal guides you through
        downloading and contextualises each dataset with quality reports and
        worked examples.
      </p>
      <a href="about.html" class="btn-hf-primary">Learn More About the Portal</a>
    </div>
    <div class="about-visual">
      <div class="about-stat">
        <span class="about-stat-icon">🌍</span>
        <div>
          <div class="about-stat-value">3</div>
          <div class="about-stat-label">Countries covered</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-stat">
        <span class="about-stat-icon">🏥</span>
        <div>
          <div class="about-stat-value">25 940</div>
          <div class="about-stat-label">Facilities catalogued</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-stat">
        <span class="about-stat-icon">📅</span>
        <div>
          <div class="about-stat-value">2015–2024</div>
          <div class="about-stat-label">Temporal coverage</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="about-stat">
        <span class="about-stat-icon">🔓</span>
        <div>
          <div class="about-stat-value">Open Access</div>
          <div class="about-stat-label">CC BY 4.0 licensed</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>


```
